stream_samples.text: airbnb double-booked my superhost, calendar sync from VRBO didn't import the iCal block. guest at the door.
Search keeps showing me places with no instant book even though I filtered for it. Why is this filter optional?
[#21450 P1] host payout in MXN held for 14 days, FX conversion happened twice, off by ~3.4%
Got AirCover claim denied for damage hosts admitted to causing themselves. Process is opaque, no human until escalation.
instant book disabled itself overnight on my listing, support says "trust score recalculation" with no detail
Co-host permissions: gave message-only access, they're seeing payout history. Confidentiality issue.
Surge of fake-listing reports in Lisbon and Mexico City — 312 in 48h, photo-similarity flag rate is 4x baseline
Search rank dropped my 4.96-star listing below new hosts after the fairness rebalance. Bookings down 30% MoM.
Calendar sync regressions are concentrated in iCal imports from competitors (VRBO, Booking). 2.1k tickets this week.
App freezes when scrolling Wishlists with 100+ saves on iPhone 15. Force-close every time.
Airbnb Service icons on the new homepage actually surface what I want now. less scrolling, more booking.
When does Aircover for Hosts apply if the guest never officially checks in? policy unclear in the help center.
Refund timing on cancelled reservations differs by 4 days between iOS app and web. Customers are confused.
[calendar-sync] iCal parser silently drops events whose DTSTAMP is missing, causes phantom availability

top_epic.title: Eliminate calendar-sync double bookings from external iCal feeds
top_epic.rationale: 2,210 signals — concentrated in superhosts who multi-list — point to one root cause: the iCal parser silently drops events whose DTSTAMP is missing or malformed, common in VRBO and Booking exports. Hosts and guests both lose trust the moment a guest shows up to a booked unit.
top_epic.verdict: Trust-critical — every double-booking generates two churn-prone customers.
top_epic.recommendation: Harden the iCal parser, auto-block on parse failure, and notify the host within 60 seconds of a sync delta.
acceptance_criteria: iCal parser tolerates missing DTSTAMP, infers from DTSTART, logs a warning
On parse failure, automatically block the affected dates pending host review
Push notification + email to host within 60s of any sync delta
Run a weekly iCal-health report per host with parse error counts
